form.formComment: Recent form sound. Comes off a 43 day let-up. Last start tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 3.5 len at this track G1 Queen's Silver Jubilee Cup February 22 over 1400m defeating Helios Express carrying 57kg. The run before that won by 1.3 len at this track G1 Centenary Sprint Cup January 25 over 1200m defeating Helios Express with 57kg. Expecting the World's Best Sprinter to extend his winning streak today.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Comes off a 43 day let-up. Last start came from midfield; 2nd of 10 at this track in the G1 Queen's Silver Jubilee Cup on February 22 over 1400m, 3.5 len behind Ka Ying Rising with 57kg at $44. The race before that 2nd of 7 at this track in the G1 Centenary Sprint Cup on January 25 over 1200m, 1.3 len behind Ka Ying Rising carrying 57kg at $77. Back to his best his past couple and should be in the finish again.

form.formComment: Returns from a 43-day let-up. At the latest run got back early 5th of 10 at this track in the G1 Queen's Silver Jubilee Cup on February 22 over 1400m, 5 len behind Ka Ying Rising carrying 57kg at $158. The start before that ran on strongly from last on the turn; 4th of 7 at this track in the G1 Centenary Sprint Cup on January 25 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Ka Ying Rising carrying 57kg at $103. Back to 1200m can see him recapture the form that saw him run second to KYR in December.

form.formComment: Returns from a 29-day let-up. Last start raced on the pace before fading 10th of 12 at this track on March 8 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Fast Network carrying 59kg at $17. The race before that raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by a neck at Happy Valley February 4 over 1200m defeating Young Champion carrying 61kg at $7.90. Nice trial coming in but he looks outclassed here.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 51-day let-up. Most recently ran last of 11 at this track on February 14 over 1200m, 8 len behind Sky Trust carrying 61kg at $7.60. Before that tracked the speed and boxed on steadily second last of 7 at this track in the G1 Centenary Sprint Cup on January 25 over 1200m, 4 len behind Ka Ying Rising with 57kg at $174. Recent trial suggests he can improve.

form.formComment: Comes off a 29 day let-up. Most recently crossed from a wide gate to lead but couldn't hold on when 6th of 12 at this track on March 8 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Fast Network carrying 56.5kg at $10. The start before that won by a neck at this track February 22 over 1000m defeating Colourful King with 61kg at $4.80. Much tougher here but his recent form suggests he can be in the finish.
